THREAD th-finance-orchid
Subject: Re: Project code for Bay trip reimbursements?
With:    Hina Park <hina@finance.company.example>
----------------------------------------
From: Casey Patel <casey@company.example>
At:   2026-04-07T09:04:52+00:00
Hi Hina — a few teammates are filing reimbursements for their Bay-area client visits this quarter. Hotel + per diem + ground transport. What project code should they use, and what attachments do you need?
----------------------------------------
From: Hina Park <hina@finance.company.example>
At:   2026-04-07T11:44:54+00:00
Bay-trip travel reimbursements go under ORCHID-27. Itemized receipts must be attached for any line item over $25 — that means hotel folio, ride receipts, and per-diem meal receipts. No grouped-total card statements. Submit via the standard expense form with ORCHID-27 in the project field. — Hina
----------------------------------------

Do NOT submit grouped-total card statements — finance will reject them.
